title: I giorni della violenza
writer: Mario Amendola, Antonio Boccaci, Gian Luigi Buzzi
actors: Peter Lee Lawrence, Beba Loncar, Luigi Vannucchi
plot: During the last months of the Civil War, Joe's brother is unjustly killed by Clifford, a captain in the Northen army. Joe decides to join a group of Southerners determined to resist till the end.
